stance_by_source.summary: Weekly chart: accumulate in the 206-210 buy box, with deeper add zones laddered at 193, ~180, ~170 and 150; reclaim 225 then aim for 266/268.
Context note: DCA zone 206-210 already used; first target 225 reclaim, then 266/268; invalidated on a close below the ~206 daily breaker block.

conflicts: The chart shows a deeper staged-accumulation ladder (193, ~180, ~170 at the 0.886, and a '150 — start adding' zone) that the extracted text omitted entirely; the plan is buy-the-dips in tranches, not a single entry.

The only source is a single educational ('context', grade 2) read dated 2025-05-21 — over a year stale and self-described as 'already exploited' — so the 206-210 anchor cannot be treated as a fresh live level; no newer call confirms or refutes it.
plain_english: Both notes come from one educational chart over a year old, where Apple was being bought into a 206-210 zone with the idea of reclaiming 225 and then running to 266-268; the chart also lays out lower buy-the-dip rungs at 193, 180, 170 and 150. Because this is a single, stale, education-only read with no recent confirmation and a stop that sits right at the entry, it's not a clean live setup. Wait for a current price and a fresh signal before acting on these levels rather than entering on the year-old plan.
